ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the bill was introduced */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* Bill number assigned to the bill */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill (e.g., introduced, passed, signed into law) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or title of the bill */,
  "last_action" TEXT /* Last action taken on the bill */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legislative session */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date when the bill was introduced */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the bill becomes effective (if signed into law) */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of sponsor IDs for quick reference */,
  "co_sponsors" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of co-sponsor IDs for quick reference */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee reviewing the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state (e.g., IN, CA, NY) */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "state_website" TEXT /* Official website of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislative session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the legislative session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the legislative session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the legislative session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., regular, special) */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the session */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the session is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson of the committee */,
  "committee_description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the committee's responsibilities */,
  "committee_members" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of committee member IDs */,
  "meeting_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of committee meetings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor or co-sponsor */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill sponsored or co-sponsored */,
  "sponsor_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsor (e.g., primary, co-sponsor) */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor or co-sponsor */,
  "sponsor_party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_district" TEXT /* District represented by the sponsor */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sponsor is the primary sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_sponsors_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill voted on */,
  "legislator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legislator casting the vote */,
  "vote_cast" TEXT /* Vote cast (e.g., yes, no, abstain) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was cast */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., floor vote, committee vote) */,
  "vote_description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_legislator_id FOREIGN KEY ("legislator_id") REFERENCES legislators ("legislator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislators" (
  "legislator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the legislator */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the legislator */,
  "district" TEXT /* District represented by the legislator */,
  "legislator_email" TEXT /* Email address of the legislator */,
  "legislator_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the legislator */,
  "legislator_address" TEXT /* Address of the legislator */,
  "legislator_committees" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of committee IDs the legislator serves on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_topics" (
  "bill_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill-topic assignment */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill assigned to the topic */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic assigned to the bill */,
  "primary_topic" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the topic is the primary topic for the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_topics_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill the action was taken on */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., introduced, passed, signed into law) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the action */,
  "action_taken_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person or entity that took the action */,
  "action_location" TEXT /* Location where the action was taken (e.g., House, Senate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_action_taken_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_taken_by") REFERENCES legislators ("legislator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, legislator, staff) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "user_supervisor" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_supervisor FOREIGN KEY ("user_supervisor") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
